dc_description: A close-up outdoor selfie of a cyclist on a paved road in bright sunlight. The person is wearing a black and blue bicycle helmet, dark sunglasses partly visible, and a sleeveless dark top. A large opaque brown rectangle obscures most of the face. The background shows a curving road bordered by dry grass, shrubs, and green trees under a clear blue sky.
novel_visual_observations: The helmet has multiple large ventilation openings and a small white brand mark on the side. Strong sunlight creates sharp shadows across the person's neck and shoulder while the road behind is partially shaded.
rich_context: Ciclabile Campagnano-Nepi, Campagnano di Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00063, Italia
